section_name: Permit to Be Carried in Vehicle
chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: A permit issued by the department under this subtitle must be carried, in a manner prescribed by the department, in the vehicle that is being operated under the permit.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.007 — Permit to Be Carried in Vehicle

A permit issued by the department under this subtitle must be carried, in a manner prescribed by the department, in the vehicle that is being operated under the permit.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B.2620), Sec. 7, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: A permit issued by the department under this subtitle must be carried, in a manner prescribed by the department, in the vehicle that is being operated under the permit.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B.2620), Sec. 7, eff. September 1, 2019.
